CustomField.formula:
AND( OR( SBQQ__StartDate__c > Expected_Signaure_Date_Booking_Date__c + 30,
SBQQ__StartDate__c >= CASE( MOD(FLOOR((MONTH(TODAY()) - 7 + 12) / 3), 4) + 1, 1, DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), 10, 1), 2, DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) >= 10, YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, YEAR(TODAY())), 1, 1 ), 3, DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) >= 10, YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, YEAR(TODAY())), 4, 1 ), 4, DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) >= 10, YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, YEAR(TODAY())), 7, 1 ), DATE(9999, 1, 1) ),
SBQQ__StartDate__c < CASE( IF( FLOOR(MOD(MONTH(TODAY()) + 5, 12) / 3) + 1 = 1, 4, FLOOR(MOD(MONTH(TODAY()) + 5, 12) / 3) ), 1, DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) <= 3, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), 9, 30 ), 2, DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) <= 3, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), 12, 31 ), 3, DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), 3, 31), 4, DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), 6, 30), DATE(9999, 1, 1) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used to trigger "Term Start Date - VP Client Ops Approval" Approval Rule
CustomField.label: Term Start Date - VP Client Ops Approval
